projects.portal.noTeamDesc: You need to join a team before you can work on a project.
projects.portal.noProjectDescDetailed: When the hacking phase begins, a draft project will be created automatically for your team. You'll then be able to edit all the details, add a description, tech stack, demo links, screenshots, and more.
projects.portal.noProjectStep1: A draft project is created automatically when the competition enters the hacking stage
projects.portal.noProjectStep2: Your team can then edit the project, fill in details, upload assets, and prepare your submission
projects.portal.noProjectStep3: Make sure to submit before the deadline, you'll see a countdown timer once your project is ready to edit
projects.portal.flaggedBanner: This project has been flagged for code reuse review.
projects.portal.deadlinePassed: Submission deadline has passed. Contact an organizer for an extension.
projects.portal.mediaHelp: Upload screenshots of your project. Images help judges understand your work. Accepted formats: PNG, JPG, GIF, WebP.
projects.portal.feedbackReadmeHelp: Upload a README.md file with feedback about your team's experience using Open Mercato during the hackathon. This file is required for final submission.
projects.portal.originalityHelp: Transparency about pre-existing code is valued and does not penalize your team. Judges use this to assess what was built during the hackathon. Using existing code is allowed but must be declared.
projects.portal.incompleteFields: Complete all required fields to submit
projects.portal.ownerOnly: Only the team owner can submit the project.
projects.portal.submitConfirmMsg: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone. Your project will be locked for editing.
projects.portal.label: Your team project
projects.portal.title: My Project
projects.fields.title: Project Title
projects.fields.builtDuringDesc: What was built during the hackathon
projects.fields.checklist.title: Title
